panels.description: Medium shot, protagonist sitting in a dark, dimly lit room, profile view, expression reflective and hollow, shadows cast long across the wall, heavy introspective mood.

bubbles.text: I saw myself as a creature of accident, driven by a sequence of events. No remorse, just a memory that haunts the silence.

panels.description: Wide shot, close-up on the protagonist's eyes staring into darkness. Faint, ethereal lighting suggesting the 'nearness of God', memory-flash overlay showing silhouettes of fire and smoke in the distance.

bubbles.text: In the stillness of the night, I stood trial for that moment of wrath. I retraced every step... the ruins of Weybridge, the impossibility of our escape.

panels.description: Close up, the protagonist suddenly bolt upright in bed, eyes wide with terror, sweating, dark room environment.

bubbles.text: I prayed the Heat-Ray had struck her out of being... painless. Anything but the alternative.

panels.description: Low angle, wide shot showing the protagonist crouching at a doorway, looking like a rat, shadows emphasizing the smallness and vulnerability of the human figure against the looming house.

bubbles.text: Dawn came, and I crept out like a rat—an inferior thing, hunted and small.

panels.description: Wide shot, the post-apocalyptic morning scene: bright pink eastern sky, a shattered cart in the foreground, abandoned belongings, and a blood-stained glass fragment on the ground, creating a stark contrast of beauty and horror.

bubbles.text: The morning was bright and fine, indifferent to the wreckage of our lives.
